items.title: AFL congratulates Jacob Mollison on 400 games
items.description: Jacob Mollison will officiate his 400th AFL match during the Round 13 Collingwood vs Melbourne game on Monday

items.title: ‘I’ve written off Brisbane’
items.description: Is the Lions season on the skids? One of our panellists certainly thinks so ahead of a huge Q Clash against the Suns. Elsewhere, there are rematches aplenty in round 13 as a number of teams face-off against each other for the second time this season. Among the games Andrew Wu and…

items.title: Six Points: St Kilda Saints, Round 12, 2026
items.description: In this episode of Talking Hawks Six Points, Tim and Liam recap Hawthorn's emphatic 52 point victory against the Saints at Marvel Stadium, that saw our co-captain bounce back to form, Will Day's successful return to football and the Wizard casting spells aplenty. Follow on Facebo…

items.title: Nothing scary about the Saints, Essendon can't move forward without Hird
items.description: Damian Barrett and Joe Pignataro bring you the latest footy news on AFL Daily. Hawthorn toyed with the Saints last night at Marvel Stadium, and a box ticked with the return of their best player - Will Day. Carlton has announced his coaching selection committee headed up by Graham…
